title: Fix remote logs
body:
Docker compatibility  - logs endpoint does not write stream headers if container has a tty

There are still some issues with logging behavior that affects this, we need to sort that out in the backend before we can know for certain if this is the right fix

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7196

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg tagging so you have the link to this PR, thanks for helping me on this

Update: this should fix remote logs the best we can: adding a tty to a container makes the logs add return carriage symbols, which is a tty quirk, so this should be an accpetable fix. See: https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/37366#issuecomment-401157643
